summary: Tested two UI fixes: 1) Screens filter column in FILTER_COLUMNS, 2) Saved views X and Pin icons visibility and clickability. All features working correctly.
features_tested: Frontend: Filter section shows 'Screens' filter dropdown: PASS
Frontend: Screens filter shows dynamic values extracted from orders (e.g., 'true') + '—Ninguno—': PASS
Frontend: Screens filter works correctly - selecting a value filters orders (6→0 when filtering by screens=true): PASS
Frontend: Saved views X and Pin icons are fully visible on hover: PASS (icons at y=129px, well within viewport)
Frontend: Saved views X and Pin icons are clickable: PASS (Pin icon click successfully unpinned a view)
Frontend: Pin icon size is w-5 h-5 (20x20 pixels, larger than before w-4 h-4=16x16): PASS
Frontend: Views bar has enough top padding (pt-1) and bottom padding (pb-3) so icons are not clipped: PASS
Frontend: All 8 filter columns are visible (blank_status, production_status, trim_status, sample, artwork_status, client, priority, screens): PASS
critical_code_review_comments: Console warnings about HTML hydration errors (<span> inside <tr>, <th> inside <span>, etc.) - these are React dev warnings that should be addressed for cleaner code but don't affect functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: Screens filter added to FILTER_COLUMNS (line 135 in constants.js). getFilterOptions in Dashboard.js (lines 289-299) has fallback logic that extracts distinct values from orders when options mapping is empty. Saved view icons are now w-5 h-5 (20x20px), positioned at -top-1.5 -right-1.5, with shadow-sm, z-10. Views bar has pt-1 pb-3 padding, flex-shrink-0 on view containers. Icon container uses 'hidden group-hover:flex' for hover reveal. Existing saved views: 'PARA BLANKS' (was pinned, tested unpinning), 'ready to scheduled' (pinned).
